# Revolutionizing Cybersecurity for Federal Agencies: Innovations in Zscaler GovCloud | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/product-insights/revolutionizing-cybersecurity-federal-agencies-innovations-zscaler-govcloud
**Captured:** 2026-04-24 via WebFetch.

---

## Overview
Zscaler's GovCloud offerings—available at FedRAMP Moderate and High authorization levels—serve over one million federal users across 13 of 15 cabinet-level agencies. The platform represents "the first zero trust cloud security solution to achieve FedRAMP authorization" when launched in 2018.

## Key Product Innovations

**Cyber Threat Protection**
- Cloud Browser Isolation delivers "AI-powered" secure browsing by executing suspicious pages in isolated environments
- ZIA now supports event-driven packet capture for forensic analysis and custom header insertion controls
- ZPA offers actionable insights into application segmentation and policy usage patterns

**Data Protection**
- Endpoint DLP prevents unauthorized data exfiltration across USB drives, printing, and cloud storage
- DLP notifications integrated into Zscaler Client Connector enable real-time user alerts
- Workflow Automation streamlines security processes with automated incident response and policy enforcement
- Cloud Browser Isolation provides "secure agentless access to SaaS and Private Web Apps over BYOD"

**Zero Trust Networking**
- Cloud Connector ensures secure connectivity for cloud-hosted workloads
- Branch Connector supports both virtual machine and hardware deployments
- Multi-session VDI enables simultaneous secure user access to virtual environments

**Platform Capabilities**
- ZDX (Digital Experience) now available on iOS with advanced analytics and AI-powered root cause analysis
- IPv6 support enables "seamless connectivity and security for IPv6-enabled networks"

## Compliance & Government Standards
The platform adheres to FISMA, FedRAMP, and NIST guidelines, providing "high-assurance infrastructure" for sensitive government operations.

## Scale
- Over 1 million federal users served
- 13 of 15 cabinet-level US federal agencies are customers
- FedRAMP Moderate and High GovCloud infrastructure are dedicated, separated from commercial cloud
